content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `origin/master...HEAD`, focusing on `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs` and the new PromptReview regression test. I found no correctness, safety, or robustness issues in this quorum-override fix. `cargo fmt --check` passed, and targeted drift tests passed. `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` still fails on pre-existing unrelated diagnostics, and `nix build` did not complete during this review.

## Amendments

None.
